user_question: Can a low-value refund be accepted?
llm_output: The request appears low risk based on evidence. It is below the policy threshold, so accept with notes and routine monitoring.

evidence.text: The refund request is below the synthetic threshold.
The customer has no prior abuse indicator in evidence.

policy_rules.text: Low-value refunds can be accepted with notes when evidence is consistent.
Routine monitoring note should be retained.
